name: creation-master-web
description: Monorepo orchestrator for backend (NestJS) and frontend (Vite + Playwright)

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix frontend ci
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c magenta,cyan "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend test
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
